entry.title: B1 Linking Orders with Purchase Orders and Notifications for Changes or Cancellations in PO
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are looking for a solution in SAP Business One to link orders to purchase orders after the fact. The standard process involves setting a checkmark in the "Logistics" tab of the relevant purchase order under "Procure non-stock items" to start the process.

However, we have another issue: When changes are made to the purchase order or when the entire purchase order is canceled, these changes are only visible in the order if you explicitly check the linking plan or the sales order. However, there is no way to get a notification in the purchase order itself when a change or cancellation occurs in the purchase order.

Is there any solution or workaround to ensure that such changes are directly reflected in the order with a notification?

We would appreciate any assistance or suggestions.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Rules 2.0 in Time Management - 2H 2023
entry.content:
Hi @priyanka

Scenario: Counting holiday in between absences

Could you please let me know if when Time Type has unit Hours then Absence Counting Configuration will works as well?

Regards,

entry.title: Re: VSCode Fiori App Odata Metadata failed
entry.content:
ok Chris, if you're asked to select a SAML 2.0 Identity Provider while querying metadata, it means the system requires authentication via Single Sign-On (SSO). You can select the appropriate Identity Provider (IdP)-entraId(based on your organization’s sso setup). Please check with your BASIS team to confirm the correct option.

Regards,

Jakes

entry.title: Settle process order to a material with REL status
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

It is possible to settle a process order into material (production variance) with REL status. Our client has no WIP policy but prefers not to manage the TECO status. 

When attempting to settle a process order in REL status, the system encountered error KD258: "Final delivery not entered for the order; it is not technically completed. How can we enable settlement into material (production variance) for orders in REL or TECO status?

Thanks for your valuable response.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry About SAP Certification Digital Skill Initiative Coupon
entry.content: Same for me. I completed before December 1st. Have sent them few emails but there is no response from them yet.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite: How to sign PDF documents
entry.content:
Hi @DriesWambacq ,

This example is based in iText 5.5.13, it is easier to use but it is very old. We have implemented it also with iText 8.0.5 and it has worked fine.

Best regards,

Roberto

entry.title: Unable to view code tour in VsCode
entry.content:
I installed CodeTour Vscode Plugin. Cloned the repo https://github.com/sap-samples/cloud-cap-samples

Tried to open .tour file and I get this error

command failed: npm i --package-lock-only --prefix /Users/adiyen/poc/sap-cap/samples/fiori npm error code E404 npm error 404 Not Found - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/@capire%2fbookstore - Not found npm error 404 npm error 404 '@capire/bookstore@*' is not in this registry. npm error 404 npm error 404 Note that you can also install from a npm error 404 tarball, folder, http url, or git url. npm error A complete log of this run can be found in: /Users/adiyen/.npm/_logs/2025-03-17T11_37_32_105Z-debug-0.log

 

Here is the last 50 lines of the log file

749 http cache https://registry.npmjs.org/buffer 3ms (cache hit)
750 silly packumentCache full:https://registry.npmjs.org/buffer set size:280480 disposed:false
751 silly placeDep ROOT buffer@5.7.1 OK for: bl@4.1.0 want: ^5.5.0
752 silly fetch manifest base64-js@^1.3.1
753 silly packumentCache full:https://registry.npmjs.org/base64-js cache-miss
754 silly fetch manifest ieee754@^1.1.13
755 silly packumentCache full:https://registry.npmjs.org/ieee754 cache-miss
756 http cache https://registry.npmjs.org/ieee754 1ms (cache hit)
757 silly packumentCache full:https://registry.npmjs.org/ieee754 set size:34910 disposed:false
758 http cache https://registry.npmjs.org/base64-js 2ms (cache hit)
759 silly packumentCache full:https://registry.npmjs.org/base64-js set size:41270 disposed:false
760 silly placeDep ROOT base64-js@1.5.1 OK for: buffer@5.7.1 want: ^1.3.1
761 silly placeDep ROOT ieee754@1.2.1 OK for: buffer@5.7.1 want: ^1.1.13
762 silly placeDep ROOT string_decoder@1.3.0 OK for: readable-stream@3.6.2 want: ^1.1.1
763 silly placeDep ROOT util-deprecate@1.0.2 OK for: readable-stream@3.6.2 want: ^1.0.1
764 silly placeDep ROOT is-number@7.0.0 OK for: to-regex-range@5.0.1 want: ^7.0.0
765 silly placeDep ROOT media-typer@0.3.0 OK for: type-is@1.6.18 want: 0.3.0
766 silly placeDep ROOT sax@1.4.1 OK for: xml2js@0.6.2 want: >=0.6.0
767 silly placeDep node_modules/xml2js xmlbuilder@11.0.1 OK for: xml2js@0.6.2 want: ~11.0.0
768 silly placeDep node_modules/body-parser-xml xmlbuilder@11.0.1 OK for: xml2js@0.5.0 want: ~11.0.0
769 silly placeDep node_modules/http-proxy-middleware ms@2.1.3 OK for: debug@4.4.0 want: ^2.1.3
770 verbose stack HttpErrorGeneral: 404 Not Found - GET https://registry.npmjs.org/@capire%2fbookstore - Not found
770 verbose stack at /Users/adiyen/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/npm-registry-fetch/lib/check-response.js:103:15
770 verbose stack at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:105:5)
770 verbose stack at async RegistryFetcher.packument (/Users/adiyen/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/pacote/lib/registry.js:90:19)
770 verbose stack at async RegistryFetcher.manifest (/Users/adiyen/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/pacote/lib/registry.js:128:23)
770 verbose stack at async #fetchManifest (/Users/adiyen/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/@npmcli/arborist/lib/arborist/build-ideal-tree.js:1202:20)
770 verbose stack at async #nodeFromEdge (/Users/adiyen/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/@npmcli/arborist/lib/arborist/build-ideal-tree.js:1040:19)
770 verbose stack at async #buildDepStep (/Users/adiyen/.nvm/versions/node/v22.14.0/lib/node_modules/npm/node_modules/@npmcli/arborist/lib/arborist/build-ideal-tree.js:904:11)

entry.title: Intra-Company Purchasing in S/4 HANA: A Guide to Efficient STO Processes
entry.content:
Intra-company purchasing in SAP is a powerful solution that enables seamless stock transfers and transactions between different entities within the same organization. By leveraging SAP’s robust functionalities, businesses can ensure accurate inventory management, cost control, and streamlined logistics.

This blog dives into the key steps involved in setting up intra-company purchasing in SAP. From defining the sales organization for the supplying company code to configuring delivery types and assigning shipping points, we’ll explore the essential configurations required to optimize internal supply chains. Whether you’re creating a customer in the supplying company code, extending material master data, this guide will walk you through the process to ensure a smooth and efficient intra-company purchasing setup.

Step 1: Define Sales Organization for Company Code

Path: SPRO --> SAP Reference IMG --> Enterprise Structure --> Definition --> Sales and Distribution --> Define copy, delete, check sales organization.

Step 2: Define Distribution Channel

Path: SPRO --> SAP Reference IMG --> Enterprise Structure --> Definition --> Sales and Distribution --> Define copy, delete, check distribution channel

Step 3: Maintain sales office 

Path: SPRO --> SAP Reference IMG --> Enterprise Structure --> Definition --> Sales and Distribution --> Maintain sales office 

Step 4: Maintain Sales Group

Path: SPRO --> SAP Reference IMG --> Enterprise Structure --> Definition --> Sales and Distribution --> Maintain Sales group

Step 5: Assign Sales Org. to Company Code

Path: SPRO --> SAP Reference IMG --> Enterprise Structure --> Assignment --> Sales and Distribution --> Assign sales organization to Company Code

Step 6: Assign distribution channel to sales organization

Path: SPRO --> SAP Reference IMG --> Enterprise Structure --> Assignment --> Sales and Distribution --> Assign distribution channel to sales organization 

Step 7: Assign division to sales organization

Path: SPRO --> SAP Reference IMG --> Enterprise Structure --> Assignment --> Sales and Distribution --> Assign division to sales organization

Step 8: Create Customer in Supplying Company Code (Transaction: BP)

Use BP roles FLCU00, FLCU01

Company Code Data

Sales & Distribution Data

Customer 23 created in Supplying Company Code

Step 9: Create Material Master Record (Transaction: MM01)

Maintain Sales views, General Plant/Storage data & Accounting Views.

Post creation extend the same material for receiving plant.

Material INTRACOMPANY MAT Created.

Step 10: Define Shipping Data for Plants under Set up STO

Path: SPRO --> Material Management --> Purchasing --> Purchase Order --> Set up stock transport order --> Define Shipping data for plants

Choose Supplying Plant and fill the relevant data

Choose Receiving Plant and fill the relevant data

Step 11: Configure Delivery Type

Path: SPRO --> Material Management --> Purchasing --> Purchase Order --> Set up stock transport order--> Configure Delivery Type and Availability Check Procedure by Plant.

NLCC – With billing document

NL – Without billing document

Step 12: Assign Document Type, One-Step procedure, Under delivery Tolerance

Path: SPRO --> Material Management --> Purchasing --> Purchase Order --> Set up stock transport order --> Assign Document Type, One-Step procedure, under delivery tolerance

Step 13: Assign Shipping Points in Logistics Execution

Path: SPRO --> Logistics Execution --> Shipping --> Basic Shipping Functions --> Shipping Points and Goods Receiving Point Determination --> Assign Shipping Points

Step 14: Stock Overview (Transaction: MMBE)

Step 15: Create Purchase Order (Transaction: ME21N)

PO 4500000247 Created.

Check the stock in MMBE

Step 16:  Create Outbound Delivery

Post Processing 

Get the Delivery Number

Step 17: Picking Outbound Delivery

Step 18: Manage Outbound Deliveries

Once GI posted, you can check the document process flow

Check the FI Documents

Step 19: Check In-Transit Stock (Transaction: MB5T)

Step 20: Post Goods Receipt against Outbound Delivery

Material Document 5000000312 Posted.

Step 21: Check Stock Overview in MMBE

 

Thanks & Regards,

Leelamohan Mannem

Alicja

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
The correct way to do this is to transport the entire new SP to your entire system perimeter.

If you transport only part of the SP (such as simulating a simple OSS note implementation), you also have to transport every required object related to those changes, so the where-used search and much testing effort.

entry.title: Re: Unlocking the Future of Sales & Service Business Processes with SAP Sales and Service Cloud

entry.title: Re: Automatic Complete and close status in EPPM project i...
entry.content: You will need to define what criteria has to be met to determine when the project is ready to be closed.  There is nothing in standard SAP but you can develop something with BPA in the BTP platform.

entry.title: A Successful Go-Live: Key to Project Success
entry.content:
The Cutover Plan: The Heart of Go-Live

The cutover plan is a detailed roadmap for transitioning from the old to the new system landscape. It includes all critical activities, timelines, and responsibilities. A well-thought-out cutover plan ensures that all technical and organizational tasks integrate smoothly. The key components of a cutover plan include:

  1. Data Migration – Clean and complete transfer of master and transactional data to the new system.

  2. System and Integration Testing – Ensuring that all relevant processes and interfaces function correctly.

  3. Smoketest – A quick initial functionality test immediately after go-live to verify that core system processes are operational.

  4. User and Authorization Management – Assigning and verifying roles for end users.

  5. Communication and Training – End users must be trained in using the new system to prevent errors in productive operation.

  6. Fallback Scenarios – A contingency plan in case issues arise that require reverting to the old system.

Customer Involvement: The Key to Success

A successful go-live requires not only technical expertise but also close collaboration with the customer. The following aspects are essential:

  • Engagement and Ownership: The customer must be actively involved in the processes and take ownership of their data and workflows.

  • Key Users and Training: Well-trained key users act as multipliers, ensuring that knowledge remains within the organization.

  • Data Quality: High-quality master data is essential for a smooth system operation. Customer validation of data is therefore crucial.

  • Effective Communication: Clear communication channels among all stakeholders prevent misunderstandings and ensure a seamless transition.

Post-Go-Live: Stabilization and Support

A successful go-live does not mark the end of the project. The first weeks after production start are crucial for system stability. A hypercare phase with intensive support ensures smooth operation and allows for quick corrections in case of issues. Regular feedback sessions help identify and implement optimizations early on.

Conclusion

A structured cutover plan and active customer involvement are the two most important factors for a successful go-live. Early customer engagement, thorough planning, and intensive support during the stabilization phase contribute to a seamless system transition and enable the benefits of the new system to be realized quickly.

entry.title: Upgrade SAP CUA netweaver environment to S/4HANA 2023
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to better understand this note about SAP CUA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3442287/E

My customer is live with S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition v 2023 FP2.

In their current OP CUA environment (which is a pure NetWeaver stack SAP_BASIS 7.52) , they cannot manage IANA time zones. According to the note; they would need to upgrade to the environment to at least version SAP_BASIS 7.57 SP00 (S/4HANA 2022) to be able to manage those IANA timezones.  

As their S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition is 2023 FP2 and will a child of the central system, they best upgrade to the 2023 version with SAP_BASIS 7.58 00. 

S/4HANA 20237.5800

As this is purely the BASIS stack they need, and there is no S/4 HANA functionality nor S/4 HANA processes running on that environment, what is the effort to upgrade and does that require an S/4HANA OP license?

Can you please advise?

Many thanks,

Goedele

entry.title: Re: Mail in Public Cloud
entry.content: Thanks Simon for letting us know! I would recommend to create a support ticket to check the cause of the 718 error.

entry.title: Re: Extensible Pipelines for SAP Continuous Integration and Delivery
entry.content:
Hi, @holger_partsch ,

Excellent blog, Thanks. I have requirement rename file like xyz.json --> xs-security.json before mta build. *.MTAR would consider xs-security.json.

In .pipeline/config.yaml, we added below commands but unfortunate xs-security.json not compiled in *.MTAR 

 

stages:
  Build:
    runFirst:
        command: " cp xyz.json xs-security.json"

Best Regards,

Vinod

entry.title: Re: how do we automate space & org members access in SAP...
entry.content: does this sync help in getting access for space and org members in cockpit or just normal user access for subaccounts

entry.title: Smarttable fields not become editable when I press the edit button
entry.content:
Hello all

In my SmartTable (UI5) i set my EntitySet which comes from Rap Backend. Here the fields are set as read only. When i bind this fields to smartField it works as expected. The Fields are read only. I want that when I press the toggle button display/edit some columns to become editable but I do not succeed.

 

< smartTable:SmartTable id="LineItemsSmartTable" entitySet="ZEWM_C_MATERIAL" smartFilterId="smartFilterBar" tableType="ResponsiveTable"
                placeToolbarInTable="true" enableExport="true" beforeExport="onBeforeExport" useVariantManagement="true" useTablePersonalisation="true" header="Line Items"
                showRowCount="true" persistencyKey="listReportFloorplanTable" enableAutoBinding="true" class="sapUiResponsiveContentPadding"
                enableAutoColumnWidth="true" editTogglable="true" showDetailsButton="true" detailsButtonSetting="Medium,Low" demandPopin="true"
                app:useSmartField = "true" editToggled="onEditToggled">
                    <smartTable:layoutData>
                        <m:FlexItemData id="_IDGenFlexItemData2" growFactor="1" baseSize="0%"/>
                    </smartTable:layoutData>
                    <m:Table id="_IDGenTable" sticky="ColumnHeaders,HeaderToolbar" growing="true" growingThreshold="20" />
                </smartTable:SmartTable>
This is my smart table code.
Does anyone know why I might be having trouble getting my SmartField to render in edit mode? No matter what I do, it seems to insist on being display-only.

entry.title: SF Compensation Kick off Template
entry.content:
Hi,

SF Compensation Kick off template is not available in Partner Edge portal (Please check link below). It has only Variable Pay - Kick off template. May I now if this is available anywhere else with leading practices and questionnaire from Compensation [Merit planning and Stocks]

 

Link:

https://partneredge.sap.com/en/library/education/products/emp_mng/hcm/implement/kick/tr_temp_ko_comp.html

entry.title: Re: GOS: How to attach url using object services
entry.content:
Hi,

I found one class for attach URL using object services, 

PARAMETERS: P_migo TYPE mblnr,
P_year TYPE Mjahr,
P_doc TYPE bitm_descr,
P_con TYPE string.


CLASS lcl_url DEFINITION.
PUBLIC SECTION.
METHODS: update_data EXPORTING ex_gos_commit_flag TYPE flag,
message.

PRIVATE SECTION.
CONSTANTS : c_typeid TYPE bitm_type VALUE 'BUS2017',
c_catid TYPE sibfcatid VALUE 'BO',
c_techtype TYPE bitm_type VALUE 'URL'.

DATA: ls_object TYPE gos_s_obj,
ls_atta_key TYPE gos_s_attcont,
ls_get TYPE gos_s_attkey,
lv_instid TYPE sibfboriid.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_url IMPLEMENTATION.
METHOD update_data.

ls_object-typeid = c_typeid.
ls_object-instid = |{ p_migo }{ p_year } |.
ls_object-catid = c_catid.

DATA(lo_ins) = cl_gos_api=>create_instance( ls_object ).

ls_atta_key-atta_cat = cl_gos_api=>c_msg.
ls_atta_key-cr_user = sy-uname.
ls_atta_key-cr_name = sy-uname.
ls_atta_key-cr_date = sy-datum.
ls_atta_key-cr_time = sy-uzeit.
ls_atta_key-tech_type = c_techtype.
ls_atta_key-descr = p_doc .
ls_atta_key-lang = sy-langu.
ls_atta_key-content = p_con.

TRY.
ex_gos_commit_flag = lo_ins->insert_al_item(
EXPORTING
is_attcont = ls_atta_key " GOS API: Strucure for Attachment
iv_roltype = cl_gos_api=>c_website ).

CATCH cx_gos_api.
ENDTRY.

IF ex_gos_commit_flag IS NOT INITIAL.
COMMIT WORK.
ENDIF.

ENDMETHOD.
METHOD message.
MESSAGE 'Uploaded Sucessfully' TYPE 'S'.
ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

 


<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<<

DATA(obj) = NEW lcl_url( ).

CALL METHOD obj->update_data
IMPORTING
ex_gos_commit_flag = DATA(lv_check).

IF lv_check IS NOT INITIAL.
CALL METHOD obj->message.
ELSE.
MESSAGE 'failed to upload' TYPE 'E'.
ENDIF.

 

 

Regards,

Kasireddy M.

entry.title: Re: Budget Threshold Alerts for Cost Centers
entry.content:

Kind regards, Ana

entry.content:
Greetings,

that would have been possible in the past but not anymore, You need to get Learning Hub subscription.

Best regards, M.

entry.title: Re: Two PR items triggered from external operation in maintenance order
entry.content:
Hello,

I am not sure if the problem was solved.

As I understand the configuration described in the previous answer is the configuration for order type and the plant and called "Define change documents, collective purchase requisition, MRP relevance". And if the setting "Collective Requisition" is active, then only one PR will be generated for one maintenance order. 

But the problem still remains, that I have separate PR items: 1 - for the operation with control key YBM2 and 2 - for the service. 

Does anyone know how to deactivate the creation of PR Item for the operation with control key YBM2 itself? We need only PR Items for the services or materials which are planned inside of the operation.

#LeanServices  #EAM

For example the maintenance order with an operation with control key YBM2. Inside the operation the services are planned with the price 20 EUR

From the maintenance order was generated one PR but with two PR Items. 

 

Thanks for any answer!

entry.title: Re: Custom Movement Types in Inventory Management Fiori apps - Part 2

Thank you for your comment. The configuration activity "Account Modification" (ID: 103170) might help you. If you are a key user, you can find it in your configuration environment to see if it is what you need.

entry.title: The RBA rules from SAP CDC cannot be disabled
entry.content: The RBA rule created in SAP CDC cannot be disabled. If I want to disable one, then it appears another rule to be enabled. If I delete one rule created, then is visible again on the list.

entry.title: Re: How to set Odata Server Side Pagination
entry.content: I can always have a complete data in chunks of 100 records each; which results in too many iterations. It would be nice to bump up the server page size in order to reduce the number of iterations.

entry.title: Re: How to get the current date time of specific time zon...
entry.content:
Hi, you can use Custom script and javascript: 
 
function getDateTimeForTimeZone(offsetHours) {
    const now = new Date();
   
    // Convert UTC time to the specific time zone by adding hours
    now.setHours(now.getUTCHours() + offsetHours);
   
    // Format the date and time
    const year = now.getFullYear();
    const month = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0"); // Month is 0-based
    const day = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
    const hours = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, "0");
    const minutes = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, "0");
    const seconds = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, "0");

    return `${year}-${month}-${day} ${hours}:${minutes}:${seconds}`;
}

// Example: Sydney, Australia (AEDT: UTC+11)
const sydneyTime = getDateTimeForTimeZone(11);

return sydneyTime;

entry.title: Re: A 25x faster mta.yaml build for SAP CAP Node.js projects
entry.content:
Hi Mauricio,

very cool stuff :). We also optimized our builds in the exact same way - ignore node_modules and skipping npm builds. We are using

 

builder: custom
commands: []

 

to not even run a single npm command during the build. I guess you won't notice the difference compared to your setup, but I just wanted to drop it for the sake of completeness.

Best regards,
Marcel

entry.title: Re: How to set Odata Server Side Pagination
entry.content: then you just ask $top=500 to get 500 records, if it is properly implemented odata.

entry.title: Positions occupied in the future - reportable as of today
entry.content:
Hello team, collegues, 
1 million € question (but if you answer, I will just shake virtually your hand).
How can we report on as of today vacant positions that will not longer be vacant in the future?

We have a report as of today of vacant positions, with "To be Hire" = Yes.
Those positions are currently vacant, but some of them have already a future incumbent.
In this report I would like to see that the positions that are currently still in "To be hired" =Yes they will no longer be vacant in the near future (possibly with a date in the future).

e.g.
Today, March 15th, positions A is in to "be hired" = yes.
On April 1st, there will be a new employee joining the organization on this positions, therfore, the "To be hired" will be = "No"
If I extract the report "vacant positions" today, I will see the position A =  to be Hired yes, therefore, and correctly, still vacant. Being HR with hundres of controlled positions, it's complex for me to remember all the positions that are no longer vacant. 
Can we have a report with a calculated field indicating the date (or other format) of the new joiner or when teh position will not be vacant anymore?

entry.title: Re: Issue with Data Sync in SAM 2405
entry.content: Just wondering if you found a resolution for this? We are seeing this same thing. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: User-Exit for BOM creation with Copy-from Button
entry.content: Tried it in a SAP APPL 617 system: Method CHANGE_AT_SAVE from BAdI BOM_UPDATE is called as expected in CS01 with copy-from function.

entry.title: Re: Smarttable fields not become editable when I press th...
entry.content:
check your metadata

if the entity is update enabled, if the individual fields are update enabled.

entry.title: Structure in BW Query designer, How to do best in SAC
entry.content:
I am looking for the best way to have a predefined row structure (selections and formulas) in SAC, like it was possible in BW Query designer. 

example : 

Gross Sales            
 thereof GS - Retail
 % share Retail on Totals GS
thereof GS - Wholesale
 % share Wholesale Totals GS
thereof GS - Ecom
...

To filter the combination of each line, different Dimensions have to be filtered and combined (like in advanced filtering)


This row structure should be reusable across different stories. 

thank you 

Dieter 

#SAC

entry.title: Re: Integration of CIM with S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
@ebsorREAD THIS :https://help.sap.com/docs/CENTRAL_INVOICE_MANAGEMENT/eed6f62fbe144d7f87d7397d673a2ffe/047aabe01dbb406dba28cd18969ba092.htmlsearch
You must use the Import Master Data from File app after using the scheduler. Company Code are not loaded when using job.
for SAP ARIBA FOR ADMINISTRATOR - you must setup who, what can read,edit,delete, setup scope

Group 1 – From S4HC thru “Ariba”

  1. Company Code <------- Here is your company code
  2. G/L Account
  3. Tax Code

Group 2 – From S4HC thru MDI

  1. Business Partner (Supplier)
  2. Project Controlling Object (WBS Element)
  3. Cost Center

entry.title: Re: what is the maximum number of lines we can create for...
entry.content: can we create one contract in SAP hana with 18,000 line items ?

entry.title: Custom Class inside Custom Logic App
entry.content:
Hello Community

     To write logic for one of Flexi workflows ( I am on Release S4 2023/FPS02), I need to use a custom class inside Custom Logic App (web based editor). Even after releasing the Custom Class with "Use System-Internally (Contract C1)" , it is not producing results. Am I missing any vital step ?

Regards,

Singh

entry.title: Re: Using HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA
entry.content:
As long as you haven't committed, the updates triggered by HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA are not executed in the database, but only registered. So each call to HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA will only check against the current database values. When you commit, all the registered updates are executed, which may cause some inconsistencies, the system tries to protect database consistency and aborts.

(Actually, it also depends on the parameters you're passing to the FM suc as DIALOG_MODE and LUW_MODE.)

entry.title: Re: Precise Control of Fiori App Access with the App Authorization Variants
entry.content:
Hi @Necronomicon ,

My understanding is that the Private Cloud Edition is the same as the on-premise version in terms of authorizations. Only the Public Cloud uses business catalogs and business user roles approach, when the public cloud was designed from scratch. From that sense, I don't think the AAV concept is applicable to the private cloud.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Cancel line item on a customer demand via SOAP
entry.content:
Hi,

We have an integration that creates new Customer Demands from an external system using the /ManageCustomerRequirementIn SOAP endpoint.

We now have a requirement to allow us to cancel a line item on these Customer Demands.

Here is SOAP request (action id 02 to update):

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope">
	<soap:Body>
		<glob:CustReqBundleMaintainRequest_sync xmlns:glob="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global">
			<CustomerRequirement ActionCode="02">
				<ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>USERID</ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
				<ChangeStateID/>
				<ID>165359</ID>	
        <ShipFromSiteID>FROMSITE</ShipFromSiteID>
				<ShipToSiteID>TOSITE</ShipToSiteID>
				<ShipToLocationID>TOLOCATION</ShipToLocationID>
				<CompleteDeliveryRequestedIndicator>true</CompleteDeliveryRequestedIndicator>
				<DeliveryPriorityCode>2</DeliveryPriorityCode>
				<TextCollection  actionCode="02">
					<Text languageCode="EN">
            <TypeCode>10011</TypeCode>
              <TextContent actionCode="02">
                <Text languageCode="EN">ORD0002747</Text>
              </TextContent>
					</Text>
				</TextCollection>
				<ShipToLocationPostalAddress>
					<StreetPrefixName>FAO: Samuel</StreetPrefixName>
					<StreetName>STREET</StreetName>
					<AdditionalStreetPrefixName>STREET PREFIX</AdditionalStreetPrefixName>
					<CityName>WORCESTER</CityName>
					<CountryCode>UK</CountryCode>
					<StreetPostalCode>WR1 1EE</StreetPostalCode>
				</ShipToLocationPostalAddress>
				<ExternalRquestItem ActionCode="02">
					<ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>USERID</ObjectNodeSenderTechnicalID>
					<ItemID>20</ItemID>
          <RequestedLocalDateTime timeZoneCode="EST">2025-03-17T10:50:00.0Z</RequestedLocalDateTime>
          <Status ActionCode="02">
            <CancellationStatusCode>2</CancellationStatusCode>
          </Status>
          <ProductKey>
						<ProductTypeCode></ProductTypeCode>
						<ProductIdentifierTypeCode></ProductIdentifierTypeCode>
						<ProductID>013190</ProductID>
					</ProductKey>
					<RequestedQuantity unitCode="EA">1</RequestedQuantity>
					<FreightForwarderID>
						<PartyTypeCode></PartyTypeCode>
						<PartyID></PartyID>
					</FreightForwarderID>
					<PartialDeliveryControlCode>1</PartialDeliveryControlCode>
					<Description languageCode="EN">Line Item 10 [Order: ORD0002747]</Description>
					<ProductRequirementSpecificationKey>
						<RequirementSpecificationID></RequirementSpecificationID>
						<RequirementSpecificationVersionID></RequirementSpecificationVersionID>
					</ProductRequirementSpecificationKey>
				</ExternalRquestItem>
			</CustomerRequirement>
		</glob:CustReqBundleMaintainRequest_sync>
	</soap:Body>
</soap:Envelope>

Other attributes of the line item (ExternalRquestItem) such as the RequestedLocalDateTime and Description change fine, but the CancellationStatusCode remains unchanged, even though there are no errors.

I've tried variations on this request, but am unable to change the status.

Thanks in advance for any help

entry.title: Re: Sap certificates renewal
entry.content:
Hi @SanjayArora 

You can extend your SAP Certification validity by completing a 20-30 minute stay certified assessment, available through an SAP Learning Hub subscription. Without it, you'll need to take the full 2-3 hour certification exam if your certification expires.

To get certified, you can purchase the new SAP Certification exam, two attempts offering, that offers two exam attempts and 10 hours of access to practice systems. This offering, however, does not include access to stay certified assessments.

To stay certified, you need an SAP Learning Hub subscription, that provides access to all resources you need to prepare for certifications (including access to expert-led live session, unlimited hours to hands-on practice systems), take the certification exams with four attempts included and stay certified with yearly assessments.

For more information, please visit the FAQ.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: how to change a fact source model from an analytic model
entry.content:
hello

i think i may be missing something

how can i change a fact model source from a analytic model.

the help i see, suggest there is a edit/gear function. i dont have it.

entry.title: Re: SAP Payroll Simulation Error – No entry in table T5GP...
entry.content:
This issue was caused by a missing entry in the table. The error was fixed by adding the following line item.

Best Regards,

bala

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports runtime does not export barcode font...
entry.content:
First thing you need to do is upgrade to the latest SP 37 from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

SP 21 is quite old and missing a lot of updates and security fixes.

Likely cause is PDF is blocking the embedding into the PDF due to licensing or possibly missing the UFL or the font is not in the correct location.

ProcessMonitor may show what's missing, compare the logs between the 2 PC's.

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports crosstab table is too big so skips th...
entry.content:
Cross tab reports layout is based on the paper size of your printer.

Try a different printer when designing the report, you can change it in the Page Setup screen.

entry.title: Re: How to Implement Load Balancing in SAP CAP Node.js on...
entry.content: yes, the Cloud Foundry platform has a routing component which distributes the requests to an app instances by default in round robin algorithm. Additionally, I would recommend you to check the High Availability at Platform and Application Level section in the SAP BTP help portal.

entry.title: SAP BPA Impossible to load project to Desktop Agent 3
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm having an issue trying to run an automation from SAP BPA.
I'm interested in project Enter Incoming Invoice (PDF) - ECC (MIRO) that is meant to fetch PDF invoice from email and posting them in SAP through MIRO. Project is already available in the market and I'd like to use it as it is.

To do that, I created an private environement and deployed the project to it:

After that I downloaded a Desktop Agent 3 that I installed on my PC, enabling Microsoft Edge extension. I succesfully link agent to my tenant:

So, as per I can see, agent and project are linked to the same environment. 

Finally, I create an Automation Launcher for my project, distributed to my agent through attributes:

I made this steps following various guides on SAP Learning: now, I expect to find a project to be started in my agent (it is in attended mode) but nothing appears and agent stays in Idle mode:

The following are my project dependancies and minimum agent version. This data seem to be greyed and not changeable:

 

I'm keep searching and trying but cannot find out how to solve this situation and go on with configuration.
Can anyone please help?

Many thanks

entry.title: Publishing back Promotion Event from Compesnation to SuccessFactors Employee central
entry.content:
@xavierlegarrec,

We are publishing promotion data from Compensation to SuccessFactors Employee Central. While the promotion information is correctly transferred, the event reason is defaulting to "Annual Increment" instead of the intended promotion event reason. 

The "Annual Increment" event reason is defaulted under Plan Setup --> Settings --> Employee Central settings and is being automatically applied during the publish process. We require the promotion event to be recorded with the specific promotion event reason, not "Annual Increment."

I have followed the KBA -2425424 - Compensation - Publishing EC Promotions & Event/Event Reasons, but please note we are not using Event derivation in Employee central and hence this KBA was not of much use.

Please provide guidance on how to ensure that promotions published from Compensation to Employee Central utilize the correct promotion event reason, bypassing the default "Annual Increment" event reason, without using Event Derivation in Employee Central.

Thanks

Rashmi

entry.title: Re: Sap Analytics Cloud (SAC) - Show filter variable defi...
entry.content:
Hi @RoccoCaliandro

I think you can create a calculated object/field in the fx node in the fact view with the name 'Target Currency' and mention the below in the expression section and use that object/field in the SAC table row

Target Currency = :Target Currency

This is nothing but basically you are assigning value the entered in the Target Currency input variable (in SAC) to the calculated object/field (created in fx node in datasphere). Finally using the calculated object/field created in fx node of datasphere in the SAC table row.

entry.title: Re: Next Level of Flexibility: Additional Commands in CI/CD Pipelines
entry.content:
Hi @SarahLendle ,

Thanks for you informative blog, I rather very simple requirement with SAP CI/CD, Change change the xyz.json to xs-security.json and build MTAR and upload to cTMS, as we have two different cf spaces to deploy the app with different role collection. 

I runFirst to change the file name and copy to cloudcitransfer,

stages:
Build:
runFirst:
command: "cp xyz.json xs-security.json && cp xs-security.json cloudcitransfer"

This did not change the xs-security.json in compiled MTAR, Is there something missing? why it is not using xs-security.json copied to cloudcitransfer? 

Regards

 Vinod

entry.title: Re: Reprovisioning system
entry.content:
Hi @doanphuongthuy1811 ,

In this case, I would open a ticket to operations team, stating like above and asking for reprovisioning the Test Tenant. My guess is that they probably need to reset the transports status to allow you to reimport these configuration transports from D to T tenant. 

Just curious, have you imported these transports to P tenant, or it has not been provisioned yet?

Tell ops team these info, because they are important to them.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: QR Code used in Smartform works fine in QA system but not in PRD

Have you got any solution over this issue?

I am facing same issue, for some cases QR is visible but for some it is not, even it is taking space in invoice but not visible, please help.

entry.title: Re: cleaning up log files in $(DIR_INSTANCE)/backup/log
entry.content: Create a crontab job to clear the logs after a specific period

entry.title: Making the most of your key Finance data in the new world of SAP BDC
entry.content:
In today's fast-paced business environment, integrating financial data with cloud solutions for advanced analytics are essential for success.

SAP Central Finance and SAP Business Data Cloud (SAP BDC) offer a powerful combination that enhances financial management and data analysis capabilities. By leveraging these tools, businesses can streamline their financial processes and gain valuable insights into their operations. This blog explores how these two solutions complement each other, providing a comprehensive approach to managing financial data in the cloud.

SAP Central Finance is a robust, enterprise-grade solution that enables organizations to streamline their financial reporting and operational processes by providing a unified and harmonized view of all financial data, sourced from multiple ERP systems. Data is replicated from source logistics systems in real-time into a target SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud system, where it goes through specific business master data mapping and transformation routines before it is posted as accounting entries. Rather than adjust reporting structures aligned with your target operating model in multiple ERP systems, you can set up your future-ready business steering operational model in a single SAP S/4HANA Cloud system.

To support the business users in their use of the central finance approach, SAP Central Finance also delivers use-case specific reconciliation reporting and error handling. These reports and tools ensure that finance teams can confidently rely on the centralized view of finance data.

This model can then be used for management and statutory reporting, but it also allows you to centralize financial transactions, ensuring consistency and accuracy in financial information. Payment and cash management centralization is a common use case where companies can achieve large efficiencies in cross-enterprise processing, compared to managing payments and cash in silos. Central Finance provides the harmonized finance data platform across all various customer ERP systems, helping finance teams make better decisions based on a trusted data foundation.

SAP Business Data Cloud (SAP BDC) was introduced by SAP in February, 2025, and is a comprehensive platform designed to streamline data management and analytics for businesses. It offers robust tools for data integration, processing, and visualization, enabling organizations to make informed decisions based on real-time insights. SAP Business Data Cloud

Managed by SAP, SAP BDC supports businesses in optimizing their data strategies and enhancing operational efficiency, especially when it comes to setting up and managing advanced analytics scenarios.

 

 

Benefits of using SAP Central Finance with SAP BDC

Accelerated time-to-value

Companies that have SAP Central Finance in place will be able to benefit from SAP BDC even faster, with an accelerated time-to-value for financial analytics scenarios. This is because rather than connect data from multiple SAP and non-SAP ERP systems to the SAP BDC, the connection would be from a single SAP S/4HANA Cloud system to SAP BDC. Therefore the existing investments made in the Central Finance approach, including settings such as the business-user defined mapping of data structures to the target model, SAP-delivered reconciliation reports, and business-user managed error handling processes can be reused.

Preserved business context 

SAP BDC can apply its deep understanding of the critical business context in SAP systems to all of your financial transactions, omitting the need to rebuild cross-system financial context to answer real-world business questions. This is critical for advanced AI and ML analyses often performed in a BDC environment which relies on robust and trusted data that is semantically aligned.

Real-time dashboards for tailored insights 

Your finance team will be able to address specific financial analytics challenges with dynamic, real-time dashboards that provide a clear view of the metrics that matter most to your business. The SAP BDC is the strategic analytic platform for SAP – giving analytics professionals the future-proof analytical environment and tools they need to understand your data in the context of its relationships and build analytics on top to answer the most complex questions. AI can be added to answer new questions.

Enhancing Strategic Planning with External Insights

To drive agile decision-making, businesses must complement internal financial data with market drivers and external factors such as economic trends, competitor performance, and industry benchmarks. SAP BDC enables this by integrating external data sources with the harmonized Central Finance model, providing a trusted, real-time view that enhances scenario planning and predictive analytics. This ensures organizations can proactively adjust strategies while maintaining data accuracy and control. 

Delivery channel for partner-delivered Insight Apps

Partners can use SAP-sourced Data Products, the standardized data fabric, and the SAP partnership with Databricks to augment the Central Finance data with more external data. This data can be combined in Insight Apps - dashboards, advanced analytical scenarios, or specific machine learning or AI-driven use cases. Customer and partners alike can build on SAP data products with their expertise. SAP BDC is designed to make key capabilities available to SAP partners so that our partners can deliver use case-specific, geography-specific, or industry-specific insight apps to their SAP customers through the SAP BDC ecosystem.

Want to learn more?

Read here to learn more about Finance use cases for AI in the SAP BDC.

entry.title: Re: Correlated Confirmation Feature SD(BOM)
entry.content:
Hi esatesenek,

sorry for not getting back earlier.
The devil is in the details. I learned something new, thanks for the hint on category!
In S/4 Fashion MARA-ATTYP needs to be selected properly (this field is not existing in SAP AFS). Meaning if header + components are material category 02, it will not keep the correlation (this was done by our material master team, not yet knowing the implications either).
So I created a set by hand and picked the right settings, header as ATTYP 10-Sales Set and components were kept as ATTYP 02-variant and - voila - it all works 😊 => Now migration team needs to watch out and set the right values for Set header material.
Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Flexible Workflow with new custom Pre-Condition for Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hello,

There is a code about this row @IS_sap_object_node_type-sont_key_part_1 as a "3D0DB2DE90581FD080E6713EEDF3948A". We did not solve this problem. Is it an error ?

entry.title: Style to change Search text color in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Is there a style to change the color of text in search bar. I am using MDK SDK 24.11.2-002 and the search text color is in blue. Is there a way to change this to white.

Note: In previous version of SDK it was getting displayed in white.

.

entry.title: Re: ToolbarItem color not changing even after applying st...
entry.content: Bill, is there a plan to fix this issue in upcoming release or should I implement Fiori Toolbar

entry.title: How to calculate discount and VAT in FSM mobile App
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

How to add a discount and VAT amount to service call in FSM mobile app?

 

We have a requirement where the technician visits the customer's place and they need to collect the money as well.

 

Kindly help us in this issue.

 

Thanks

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to calculate discount and VAT in FSM mobile App
entry.content:
Hello

This functions are available through the Sales Order DTO, that can be created from it's module on Mobile. Here's the documentation for it: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIELD_SERVICE_MANAGEMENT/fsm_mobile/sales-orders.html

With the correct permissions on the User Policy Group this module is available for any mobile user.

Best Regards

Hércules Kerschner

entry.title: Re: Download excel in specific folder SAP
entry.content: SAP GUI/Options/Local Data/ File Lifetime (Navigation to view Directory of Documents). You can change the default file location to a different folder or you can use transaction SO21 to define a new work directory

entry.title: Re: Printing a single page from multiple pages using Crystal Reports Viewer
entry.content: I do see it now. Odd, I can't find any reference to that dialog box. Is this a WEB or desktop app? Would it be possible to create a simple test app so I can test your work flow? If you can send me a direct message and attach the test app?

entry.title: "Composing and automating with SAP Build the No-Code Way" unit 2 lesson 4 doesn't match trainer
entry.content:
Hi, I'm finding that a crucial hands-on portion of this lesson varies widely from the trainer... see screen grabs. 

The exercise concerns creating a SAP Build mobile barcode scanner that works with a REST API.   After setting up my trial BTP cockpit, I am searching and experimenting in the Build Apps editor screens to attempt to reconcile the current editor with the training guide, I have run up against a failed response in using the API and have had no luck getting past it.  Specifically, the steps for Configuring the REST API Integration from the trainer are not very relevant to the state of the current Build Apps editor. It is a roadblock to finishing the unit and learning journey.  I hope the people involved can make amends here. 

 Here is just one of the screens but many differences exist : Build Apps editor

Trainer shows: Comensurate Trainer screen

Trainer link to Create Your First App With SAP Build Apps 

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Carrier selection based on gross weight ?
entry.content:
Hello @Saurabh_Goyal

Thank you for your proposal.

In theory this could work but not at 100% from my perspective because:

- The customer is using the same MTR in both cases

- The TCM layer can filter the TSP results if they are different from 0 ==> in this case the customer could forget to maintain some pricing master data. The customer wants to have a list of available carriers even if the price maintenance has been forgotten

-  The TCM layer can sort the TSP results based on pricing ==> in this case the customer doesn't want to have not relevant carrier proposed into the list

With all these reasons, we cannot deal with TCM feature for TSPS.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance: Processo de Evento para o Brasil
entry.content: Como é possível passar para o DRC evento de prorrogação ? Eventos 111500 e 111501

entry.title: Re: BW-MT Transformation lookup rule with compounded objects
entry.content: we are using BW-MT 1.25.42 with an BW/4 2021 backend

entry.title: Re: in MD04, how to remove element if it's origin and des...
entry.content:
Hello

An STO with the same issuing and receiving storage location does not make any sense. What is the business reason behind this STO?

MRP does not determine the issuing storage location of STOs automatically, so if those STOs are being converted from STRs created by MRP, you might have an active implementation of BAdI MD_EXT_SUP, that should be reviewed. 

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Issue while loading maintenance order using LTMC
entry.content:
Hi @AbhijitGoswami,

Could you provide more details about the error message? A screenshot would work, but for instance, you could also share:

  1. In which specific activity the error is being thrown.
  2. The full text of the error message.
  3. Its message class and number.
  4. And so on.

That'll definitely help us assist you!

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: Re: BW-MT Transformation lookup rule with compounded objects
entry.content: we changed a keyfigure to SUM and the Currency 0LOC_CURRENCY we get from a compound infoobject. The change of the keyfigure break the lookup of the compound infoobject

entry.content:

However, there are no explicit steps so I feel like I am missing something. The way I am reading, this would be for a Native App to Native App call?

entry.title: Re: BOM Status 02 consider in program CS_BOM_PRODVER_MIGR...
entry.content:
Hello

I would suggest you to implement the following note and retest this scenario:

3464044 - CS_BOM_PRODVER_MIGRATION02: False BOM data in Production version

If the issue persists, you might need to open an incident to SAP.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: business event for Transportation order/ Freight order in sap s4 hana
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I require an event either event mesh or business event to trigger after save event for Freight order creation or updating and once the trigger point is triggered the desired data should be sent to a  third party system via logical port or communication system. Let me if anyone has any idea on this.
